components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// Scientifically, c = sqrt(a^2 - b^2) ~= 127. 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// However, to satisfy the visual requirement of "Sun slightly displaced" while maintaining a visible "ellipse shape",
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// we reduce this offset artificially. This creates a stylised orbit that is easier to understand visually.

components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// Improved High-Quality Atmosphere Shader
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// Revised for a larger, softer, more realistic bloom
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const atmosphereFragmentShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Dot product of normal and view vector (0,0,1 in view space)
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float viewDot = dot(vNormal, vec3(0, 0, 1.0));
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Calculate intensity with a softer falloff (power 4.0 instead of 8.0)
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // This allows the gradient to spread further inwards, making the atmosphere look "thicker" and softer
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float intensity = pow(clamp(1.0 + viewDot, 0.0, 1.0), 4.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Atmosphere Color: Brighter, more vibrant blue to interact better with Bloom
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 atmosphereColor = vec3(0.3, 0.6, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Low alpha (0.15) to make it very subtle and not obstruct the planet view
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(atmosphereColor, 1.0) * intensity * 0.15;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const sunAtmosphereFragmentShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 normal = normalize(vNormal);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float viewDot = dot(normal, vec3(0.0, 0.0, 1.0));
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float intensity = pow(1.0 - viewDot, 4.5);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(1.0, 0.7, 0.3, 0.25) * intensity;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const haloVertexShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vUv = uv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const haloFragmentShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:uniform float uTime;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec2 center = vec2(0.5, 0.5);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec2 pos = vUv - center;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float dist = length(pos) * 2.0; 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float glow = 0.05 / (dist - 0.15) - 0.1;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  glow = clamp(glow, 0.0, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float angle = atan(pos.y, pos.x);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float rays = sin(angle * 24.0 + uTime * 0.5) * 0.1 + 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:               sin(angle * 12.0 - uTime * 0.2) * 0.2 + 0.8;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float intensity = glow * rays;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  intensity = pow(intensity, 1.5);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 coreColor = vec3(1.0, 0.95, 0.8);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 midColor = vec3(1.0, 0.6, 0.1);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 edgeColor = vec3(0.8, 0.2, 0.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 finalColor = mix(edgeColor, midColor, intensity);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  finalColor = mix(finalColor, coreColor, smoothstep(0.6, 1.0, intensity));
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float alpha = intensity * smoothstep(1.0, 0.2, dist);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, alpha);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// --- MOON SHADERS ---
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const moonVertexShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:uniform vec3 sunPosition;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vUv = uv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vNormal = normalize(normal);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // sunPosition is passed in local space, so direction is simply destination minus origin
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vSunDir = normalize(sunPosition - position);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const moonFragmentShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:uniform sampler2D moonTexture;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 normal = normalize(vNormal);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 sunDir = normalize(vSunDir);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float dotProd = dot(normal, sunDir);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Sharper terminator for vacuum environment (Moon has no atmosphere)
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Use a small smoothstep range to avoid pixelated edges but keep it crisp
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float dayFactor = smoothstep(-0.02, 0.02, dotProd);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 texColor = texture2D(moonTexture, vUv).rgb;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Standard Lambertian diffuse
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float diffuse = max(dotProd, 0.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Day side: Texture * Diffuse light
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Boost slightly to make it pop against the black background
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 dayColor = texColor * (diffuse + 0.1); 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Night side: Simulate faint Earthshine (light reflected from Earth to Moon)
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // This prevents the dark side from being pitch black, adding realism
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 nightColor = texColor * 0.02;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 finalColor = mix(nightColor, dayColor, dayFactor);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// --- EARTH SHADERS (UPDATED WITH REALISTIC SPECULAR) ---
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const earthVertexShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vViewDir;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vUv = uv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Transform normal to View Space
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vNormal = normalize(normalMatrix * normal); 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Calculate Position in View Space
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec4 mvPosition = modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // View Direction (Camera is at 0,0,0 in View Space)
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vViewDir = normalize(-mvPosition.xyz);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Calculate Sun Direction in View Space
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Sun is at World (0,0,0). Transform (0,0,0,1) with ViewMatrix.
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec4 sunViewPos = viewMatrix * vec4(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vSunDir = normalize(sunViewPos.xyz - mvPosition.xyz);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * mvPosition;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const earthFragmentShader = `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:uniform sampler2D dayTexture;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:uniform sampler2D nightTexture;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:uniform sampler2D specularMapTexture;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:varying vec3 vViewDir;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 normal = normalize(vNormal);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 sunDir = normalize(vSunDir);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 viewDir = normalize(vViewDir);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float dotProd = dot(normal, sunDir);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Softer terminator (Twilight zone)
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float dayFactor = smoothstep(-0.2, 0.2, dotProd);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 dayColor = texture2D(dayTexture, vUv).rgb;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 nightColorSample = texture2D(nightTexture, vUv).rgb;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float specularStrength = texture2D(specularMapTexture, vUv).r;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float diffuse = max(dotProd, 0.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Blinn-Phong Specular Reflection
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 halfVector = normalize(sunDir + viewDir);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float NdotH = max(dot(normal, halfVector), 0.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // HIGHER SHININESS (80.0) -> Much smaller, tighter reflection, simulating sun glint on water
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float specular = pow(NdotH, 80.0) * specularStrength;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // LOWER INTENSITY (0.8) -> Subtle, realistic shine, not overpowering
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 specularColor = vec3(1.0, 0.95, 0.8) * specular * 0.8;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 finalDay = dayColor * (diffuse + 0.1) + specularColor; 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 cleanNight = max(nightColorSample - 0.2, 0.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 finalNight = cleanNight * vec3(6.0, 4.5, 3.0); 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Sunset / Atmosphere scattering at terminator
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  float sunsetIntensity = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, 0.25, abs(dotProd));
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 sunsetColor = vec3(0.9, 0.4, 0.1) * sunsetIntensity * 0.6 * (1.0 - specularStrength);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  vec3 finalColor = mix(finalNight, finalDay, dayFactor);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  finalColor += sunsetColor;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:`;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:// --- BACKGROUND ---
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:const ParallaxStars = () => {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  const count = 2500;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  // Generate random positions, sizes, and colors for stars
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  const [positions, sizes, colors] = useMemo(() => {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    const positions = new Float32Array(count * 3);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    const sizes = new Float32Array(count);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    const colors = new Float32Array(count * 3);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    const color = new THREE.Color();
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    for(let i=0; i<count; i++) {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        // Distribute stars in a spherical volume
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        // We put stars between 800 and 3800 units away. 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        // Since camera moves 0-300 units, this provides subtle but realistic parallax.
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        const r = 800 + Math.random() * 3700; 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        const theta = 2 * Math.PI * Math.random();
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        const phi = Math.acos(2 * Math.random() - 1);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        positions[i*3] = r * Math.sin(phi) * Math.cos(theta);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        positions[i*3+1] = r * Math.sin(phi) * Math.sin(theta);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        positions[i*3+2] = r * Math.cos(phi);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        // Size variation for visual interest
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        sizes[i] = 20.0 + Math.random() * 40.0; 
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        // Color variation (Real stars aren't just white)
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        // 10% Reddish, 20% Blueish, 70% White
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        const type = Math.random();
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        if(type > 0.9) color.setHex(0xffaaaa); // Reddish giants
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        else if(type > 0.7) color.setHex(0xaaccff); // Blue giants
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        else color.setHex(0xffffff); // Main sequence white
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        colors[i*3] = color.r;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        colors[i*3+1] = color.g;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        colors[i*3+2] = color.b;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    return [positions, sizes, colors];
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  const material = useMemo(() => new THREE.ShaderMaterial({
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    uniforms: {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    vertexShader: `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        attribute float size;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        varying vec3 vColor;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        uniform float pixelRatio;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            vColor = color; // Used default attribute injected by Three.js when vertexColors: true
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            vec4 mvPosition = modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            // Size attenuation: Scale size based on distance to camera
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            gl_PointSize = size * pixelRatio * (150.0 / -mvPosition.z);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            gl_Position = projectionMatrix * mvPosition;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    `,
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    fragmentShader: `
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        varying vec3 vColor;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        void main() {
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            // Soft circular particle
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            vec2 coord = gl_PointCoord - vec2(0.5);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            float dist = length(coord);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            if (dist > 0.5) discard;
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            // Soft glow from center with exponential falloff
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            float strength = 1.0 - (dist * 2.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            strength = pow(strength, 2.0);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:            gl_FragColor = vec4(vColor, strength);
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    `,
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    transparent: true,
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    vertexColors: true,
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    depthWrite: false, // Don't write to depth buffer so they don't occlude each other weirdly
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    blending: THREE.AdditiveBlending
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  return (
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        <bufferGeometry>
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:        </bufferGeometry>
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:    </points>
components/activities/Earth3D.tsx:  )

components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:// --- SHADERS (Adapted from Earth3D.tsx) ---
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:const earthVertexShader = `
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec3 vViewDir;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:uniform vec3 sunPosition;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vUv = uv;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vNormal = normalize(normalMatrix * normal);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec4 mvPosition = modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vViewDir = normalize(-mvPosition.xyz);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  // sunPosition is in World Space. Transform to View Space.
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec4 sunViewPos = viewMatrix * vec4(sunPosition, 1.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vSunDir = normalize(sunViewPos.xyz - mvPosition.xyz);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * mvPosition;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:`;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:const earthFragmentShader = `
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:uniform sampler2D dayTexture;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:uniform sampler2D nightTexture;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:uniform sampler2D specularMapTexture;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec3 vViewDir;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 normal = normalize(vNormal);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 sunDir = normalize(vSunDir);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 viewDir = normalize(vViewDir);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float dotProd = dot(normal, sunDir);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float dayFactor = smoothstep(-0.2, 0.2, dotProd);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 dayColor = texture2D(dayTexture, vUv).rgb;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 nightColorSample = texture2D(nightTexture, vUv).rgb;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float specularStrength = texture2D(specularMapTexture, vUv).r;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float diffuse = max(dotProd, 0.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 halfVector = normalize(sunDir + viewDir);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float NdotH = max(dot(normal, halfVector), 0.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float specular = pow(NdotH, 80.0) * specularStrength;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 specularColor = vec3(1.0, 0.95, 0.8) * specular * 0.8;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 finalDay = dayColor * (diffuse + 0.1) + specularColor; 
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 cleanNight = max(nightColorSample - 0.2, 0.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 finalNight = cleanNight * vec3(6.0, 4.5, 3.0); 
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float sunsetIntensity = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, 0.25, abs(dotProd));
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 sunsetColor = vec3(0.9, 0.4, 0.1) * sunsetIntensity * 0.6 * (1.0 - specularStrength);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 finalColor = mix(finalNight, finalDay, dayFactor);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  finalColor += sunsetColor;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, 1.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:`;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:

components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:`;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:// Improved High-Quality Atmosphere Shader from Earth3D
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:const atmosphereFragmentShader = `
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float viewDot = dot(vNormal, vec3(0, 0, 1.0));
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float intensity = pow(clamp(1.0 + viewDot, 0.0, 1.0), 4.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 atmosphereColor = vec3(0.3, 0.6, 1.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(atmosphereColor, 1.0) * intensity * 0.3;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:`;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:const haloVertexShader = `
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vUv = uv;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:`;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:const haloFragmentShader = `
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:uniform float uTime;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec2 center = vec2(0.5, 0.5);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec2 pos = vUv - center;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float dist = length(pos) * 2.0; 
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float glow = 0.05 / (dist - 0.15) - 0.1;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  glow = clamp(glow, 0.0, 1.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float angle = atan(pos.y, pos.x);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float rays = sin(angle * 24.0 + uTime * 0.5) * 0.1 + 
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:               sin(angle * 12.0 - uTime * 0.2) * 0.2 + 0.8;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float intensity = glow * rays;
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  intensity = pow(intensity, 1.5);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 coreColor = vec3(1.0, 0.95, 0.8);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 midColor = vec3(1.0, 0.6, 0.1);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 edgeColor = vec3(0.8, 0.2, 0.0);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  vec3 finalColor = mix(edgeColor, midColor, intensity);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  finalColor = mix(finalColor, coreColor, smoothstep(0.6, 1.0, intensity));
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  float alpha = intensity * smoothstep(1.0, 0.2, dist);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, alpha);
components/activities/KaamosEarth.tsx:`;

components/activities/KaamosViewer.tsx:    
components/activities/KaamosViewer.tsx:    // Clamp
components/activities/KaamosViewer.tsx:    if (hours > 24) hours = 24;

components/activities/KaamosViewer.tsx:    return hours;

components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:const earthVertexShader = `
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec3 vViewDir;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:uniform vec3 sunPosition;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vUv = uv;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vNormal = normalize(normalMatrix * normal);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vec4 mvPosition = modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vViewDir = normalize(-mvPosition.xyz);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vec4 sunViewPos = viewMatrix * vec4(sunPosition, 1.0);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vSunDir = normalize(sunViewPos.xyz - mvPosition.xyz);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  gl_Position = projectionMatrix * mvPosition;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:`;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:const earthFragmentShader = `
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:uniform sampler2D dayTexture;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:uniform sampler2D nightTexture;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec2 vUv;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec3 vNormal;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec3 vSunDir;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:varying vec3 vViewDir;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:void main() {
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vec3 normal = normalize(vNormal);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vec3 sunDir = normalize(vSunDir);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  float dotProd = dot(normal, sunDir);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  float dayFactor = smoothstep(-0.01, 0.01, dotProd);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vec3 dayColor = texture2D(dayTexture, vUv).rgb;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vec3 nightColor = texture2D(nightTexture, vUv).rgb * 0.2;
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  vec3 finalColor = mix(nightColor, dayColor, dayFactor);
components/activities/TiltOrbitExplorer.tsx:  gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, 1.0);

App.tsx:                 </div>
App.tsx:               </div>
App.tsx:               <p className="text-gray-300">
App.tsx:                 In Finland (high latitude), sunlight hits the ground at a low angle, spreading the energy over a large area. This makes it cooler than at the Equator where light hits directly.

When multiplied by the brightness boost factor (`vec3(2.0, 1.6, 1.0)`), these grey areas become visible light grey/white, creating a muddy or \"whitish\" appearance instead of a dark night with city lights.\n    *   **Atmosphere Haze**: The `atmosphereFragmentShader` used a non-standard rim calculation `pow(0.55 - dot..., 4.0)` which inadvertently created a haze in the center of the object (since `0.55 - 1.0` is non-zero), contributing to a milky look over the dark side.\n3.  **Implementation**:\n    *   **Earth Fragment Shader**:\n        *   Sample the `nightTexture`.\n        *   Apply a power curve (`pow(color, 4.0)`) to the sampled night color. This \"crushes the blacks,\" effectively pushing the dark grey landmasses to true black while keeping the bright city lights visible.\n        *   Boost the resulting high-contrast lights to make them pop against the now-pitch-black background.\n    *   **Atmosphere Fragment Shader**:\n        *   Revert to a standard Fresnel/Rim lighting calculation: `pow(1.0 - dot(normal, view), 4.0)`. This ensures the atmosphere glow is strictly on the edges and transparent in the center, preventing it from washing out the dark side of the Earth.\n\n",

This eliminates the \"flying away\" effect caused by stale position data.\n3.  **Safety Threshold**: I added a check `if (deltaVec.length() < 5)` inside the loop. If a massive jump is detected (due to browser lag or tab switching), the camera ignores it rather than teleporting into deep space.\n\nThese changes ensure the camera stays \"glued\" to the Earth while still allowing you to orbit around it freely.\n\n",
